title: State Street and FactSet Partner to Streamline Data Flows Across Front, Middle & Back Office
text: BOSTON & NORWALK, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street and FactSet today announced a strategic partnership integrating State Street Alpha and the complementary strengths of FactSet to streamline data flows across the front, middle and back-office through State Street's Alpha Data Platform.
